title: HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SKYLINE HOSPITAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general and specialty health care, hospital and trauma services, and education and outreach. Does not provide reproductive health services. 211 Skyline Drive White Salmon, WA 98672 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (509) 493-1101 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (509) 493-1101 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in for emergency services FEES: Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, private insurance, and private pay. Sliding scale fees may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Wasco County Services: Emergency Room Care Hospitals Urgent Care Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - SKYLINE MEDICAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
